tracks.rawText: 4:15J.M. 33v5.5Regional Mexican Corrido Tumbado, Acoustic instrumentation features two twelve-string guitars (requinto and armonía) and a tololoche (double bass), The lead guitar plays rapid, chromatic melodic runs and double-stops with a bright, percussive attack, The rhythm guitar provides a constant percussive strumming pattern emphasizing the off-beats, The tololoche plays a syncopated, walking bassline with heavy string slap, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, almost spoken-word melodic style with slight nasal resonance, The tempo is 135 BPM in 3/4 time signature, The key is G Major1PublishRemix
